
_C0 ==== Target Camera =========
_L 0x00000000 0x00000000
_C1  TC Enable (L+DpadUp)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000110
_L 0x001E0400 0x00000001
_C1  TC Disable (L+DpadDown)
_L 0xD0000000 0x10000140
_L 0x001E0400 0x00000000
_C1  TC Cycle (L+DpadLeft/Right, blocked by R)
_L 0xD000000B 0x30000200
_L 0xD0000003 0x10000180
_L 0xE1020000 0x001E0403
_L 0xE0010000 0x301E0401
_L 0x30400004 0x001E0401
_L 0x001E0403 0x00000001
_L 0xD0000002 0x10000120
_L 0xE1010000 0x001E0403
_L 0x30300004 0x001E0401
_L 0x001E0403 0x00000001
_L 0xD0000001 0x30000120
_L 0xD0000000 0x30000180
_L 0x001E0403 0x00000000
